intro_para1: Matteo & Co. brings a refined eye and a passion for the details that transform a room from simply furnished to truly finished. Whether collaborating with architects and designers on photo shoot day, or helping a homeowner see their space with fresh perspective — every project is approached with the same care and intention.
intro_para2: Founded by Tamera Matteo, the studio specializes in the quiet work that makes great spaces unforgettable: the perfect arrangement, the unexpected accent, the finishing touch that makes everything click.
private_para1: Transform your living space into a photo-worthy setting — whether by rearranging your current furniture, layering in antiques, or enhancing with carefully sourced decorative objects.
private_para2: Fees are determined by the size of the space, the quantity of rooms, and the depth of sourcing required. Every project begins with a complimentary consultation.
photoshoot_para1: For architects and interior designers preparing projects for print publications, websites, and social media. Meticulous preparation meets collaborative on-set execution.
photoshoot_para2: Fees are structured by half-day or full-day scheduling, with pricing tailored to the scope of the shoot. Contact us to discuss your project.
pricing_note: Photo shoot styling fees are based on half-day or full-day scheduling and the overall scope of the project. Contact us with your shoot details for a custom quote.
